name: zeffect_anim_shutdown
description: zEffect_Anim::Shutdown frees animation heap/list/text/activation state and resets animation runtime counters.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zEffect_Anim::Shutdown: 81 unmasked mismatches after masking 72 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 157 bytes and the VC object body is 160 bytes with 2 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies heap, entry list, text-id list, activation records, instantiated flag, and count reset behavior.
